theme_rankings.why_now: HBM4·CoWoS·EUV 모두 캐파 부족 지속. 2027까지 수요 가시성 확보된 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 정점 논쟁 + 중국 수출 규제 변동성. 어닝 미스 시 30% 낙폭 흔함.

theme_rankings.why_now: 강한 추세장에서만 사용. 분할매수 + 손절선 명확히 + 자산의 5~10% 이하.
theme_rankings.risk: 장기 보유 ❌. 횡보·하락장에선 음의 복리(volatility decay)로 손실 누적.

theme_rankings.why_now: MSFT·GOOG·META·AMZN 2026 Capex 합계 $400B+. AI 매출 회수 본격화 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 광고·소비 둔화 시 Capex 가이던스 컷 가능. 빅테크 동반 변동성.

theme_rankings.why_now: AI가 돌아가려면 전기 필요. 미국 변압기 대기 100주+ → 만드는 회사들 5년치 일감 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 후반 진입 우려는 아직 작지만, 금리 급등 시 인프라주 동반 조정.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🚂 AI의 '밴더빌트' — 실제 업무에 AI 박는 운영자
theme_rankings.why_now: 추론 비용 90% 하락 + 엔터프라이즈 도입 본격. 진짜 텐베거 후보가 여기서 다수.
theme_rankings.risk: 밸류에이션 과열. 매출 성장 30%+ 못 보이면 멀티플 압축.

theme_rankings.why_now: 인지노동 다음은 물리노동. 2027~2030 진정한 텐베거 가능 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 상용화 시점 불확실. 미래 옵션밸류 비중 큼. 변동성 극심.

narrative.summary: Talen Energy: 정량 종합 71점, 라벨 ACCUMULATE. 단기 62 / 중기 74 / 장기 74. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)
narrative.entry_guide: API 키 미설정 — 진입 가이드 자동 생성 불가
narrative.risks: LLM 서술 미생성. 정량 점수만 참고할 것

overheat.label: 정상
overheat.guidance: 진입 OK. 종합 점수가 좋다면 매수 검토.

guidance.basis: ATR(14) 4.9% → 2-ATR 손절폭 9.8%. 포트폴리오의 1%만 risk-on (1번 손절 = 자산 1% 손실).

trade_plan.rationale: 진입 zone에 3개 시그널 합류 — 주봉 50MA, 일봉 200MA, Anchored VWAP (고점 기준). 현재가 대비 +9.5% 위치. T1 $450.6 (R:R 2.5)
trade_plan.invalidation: 진입가 $370.8 아래 손절가 $338.7 일봉 종가 마감 시 plan 폐기.

top_news.title: Pimco Favors Australian Bonds, Betting on Rate Cuts Next Year
top_news.summary: Pacific Investment Management Co. is favoring five- to 10-year Australian debt, wagering the central bank will ultimately be forced to pivot to interest rate cuts to support a slowing economy.

top_news.title: Warsh Rocks Bond Market in Debut, Sparks Surge in Rate-Hike Bets
top_news.summary: It didn’t take Kevin Warsh long to get the bond market’s attention.

top_news.title: Asian Stocks, Bonds to Fall on Hawkish Fed Signals: Markets Wrap
top_news.summary: Asian stocks and bonds were poised to track US losses after the Federal Reserve signaled rates may need to rise further to contain inflation.

top_news.title: Highlights From Fed Chair Warsh’s First News Conference
top_news.summary: Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh spoke at his first news conference since being appointed the central bank's chair. The Fed's policy-setting Federal Open Market Committee decided to leave rates unchanged and vowed to deliver price stability. Here are some of the key moments from Warsh's news conference. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Crude Oil Edges Lower as Deal to Reopen Hormuz Goes Into Effect
top_news.summary: Oil edged lower as traders assessed the interim US-Iran peace deal, with state television in the Islamic Republic and a US official saying that the pact had been signed digitally by the nations’ presidents.

top_news.title: PE Must Be Proactive to Drive Transactions: Bain's Gordon
top_news.summary: Chris Gordon, co-head of the global private equity at Bain Capital, joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Bloomberg Surveillance: The Fed Decides 6/17/2026
top_news.summary: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh vowed to restore price stability after officials left interest rates unchanged and signaled growing support for rate hikes this year. Lisa Abramowicz and Scarlet Fu host a special edition of "Bloomberg Surveillance" covering the latest news from the Federal Reserve. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Warsh Says FOMC Had 'Good Family Fight' on Fed Policy as Rates Stay Steady
top_news.summary: Andrew Szczurowski, strategic income portfolio manager at Morgan Stanley Investment Management, said that it is still to be determined if Kevin Warsh will follow through on hawkish signals he gave in his first press conference as Federal Reserve chair as the Fed held rates steady. Szczurowski, who was joined by Bloomberg Economy's Stuart Paul, said that despite the decision to hold rates, the FOMC remains very divided as members disagree on the direction the Fed should take interest rates.  (Sou

top_news.title: Barings’ High-Yield Playbook in a Warsh-Led Fed Era
top_news.summary: Kelly Burton, High Yield Portfolio Manager at Barings, discussed the current dynamics in the high-yield credit market, emphasizing strong institutional demand for double B and single B rated credits with yields between 6-8%. Despite elevated yields expected to persist regardless of Federal Reserve actions, Burton noted a complex macroeconomic environment influenced by inflationary pressures, partly driven by geopolitical tensions such as the Iran conflict and high oil prices. She speaks with Rom

top_news.title: Dollar Steamrolls Peers as Fed Opens Door for 2026 Rate Hike
top_news.summary: The dollar capped its best day in more than three months as traders rushed to buy the US currency after Federal Reserve officials signaled growing support for interest-rate hikes this year.
